outcome_decision.reason: Outcome change is too small or ambiguous; keep lesson as evidence but continue from best accepted schema.

quality.interpretation: Do not repeat as a recommendation; use as cautionary evidence.

avoid_next: Do not reapply one-time conversion when already in place
recommend_next: Search for better balance between dense penalties and sparse bonus to improve task completion; consider decreasing weight of dominant penalties (e.g., r_distance) and increasing one-time contact bonus weight, or adding dense progress shaping.
applicability_notes: When repeated event exploitation is fixed but task performance remains poor, shift focus to reward-shaping structure rather than further exploit fixes.

lesson_card.summary: Current schema resolves contact exploitation but shows severe task failure; dense penalties dominate and one-time landing bonus is rarely earned. Evidence for reward hack is weak, and further edits should focus on structural improvements to guide successful landing.
